name: Z-Scored Ask Concentration (Contra) Tighter
hypothesis: A high concentration of ask-side liquidity (an 'ask wall') signals impending downward price pressure. Tightening the z-score threshold from 2.5 to 3.0 will isolate more extreme, statistically significant walling events, which should have even higher predictive power for a price drop.
mutation_note: Per feedback, tightened z-score threshold from 2.5 to 3.0 to isolate the most extreme ask-wall events and test for improved WR.
